title: collomia tinctoria var. subulata
intro: Collomia tinctoria var. subulata, also known as the Purple Prairie Clover, is a perennial herb native to the western regions of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in isoflavones, which have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting bone health. Collomia tinctoria var. subulata can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and reap its potential health benefits.
